# zstack_volume_snapshot (Resource)

Manage ZStack data volume snapshots.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the snapshot.
- `volume_uuid` (String) The UUID of the source volume.

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the snapshot.
- `revert` (Boolean) Set to true to revert the source volume to this snapshot. The revert is triggered during update when this field changes from false to true. After the revert completes, the value resets to false.

### Read-Only

- `distance` (Number) The distance from the root snapshot.
- `format` (String) The snapshot format.
- `group_uuid` (String) The snapshot group UUID, if any.
- `latest` (Boolean) Whether this is the latest snapshot in its tree.
- `parent_uuid` (String) The UUID of the parent snapshot, if any.
- `primary_storage_uuid` (String) The UUID of the primary storage holding the snapshot.
- `size` (Number) The size of the snapshot in bytes.
- `state` (String) The administrative state of the snapshot.
- `status` (String) The operational status of the snapshot.
- `tree_uuid` (String) The UUID of the snapshot tree.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the snapshot.
- `volume_type` (String) The type of the source volume.
